ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Text Ruling

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Continued To Jul-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar appeared by courtcall for Leticia DiLallo.

Mr. Lazar explained that he did not appear at the last hearing because there are three related estates being handled by different examiners in different ways and that he didn't understand that he had to appear on this estate. The court stated that calendaring mishaps do not constitute good cause. Sanctions in the amount of $250.00 are imposed against Mr. Lazar and are payable within 10 days of issuance of the written order. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to July 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Lazar that a notice of hearing and a proposed order are needed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An order to show cause re sanctions under CCP 128, and an order to appear will be issued to Attorney Lon D. Lazar to appear on June 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is also continued to June 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-07-1996 is admitted to probate. Leticia De Lallo is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-03-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
